prompt: hey can you help me design a baml schema for extracting data from invoices? I need to pull out like vendor info, line items with prices and quantities, tax amounts, and total. also sometimes invoices have multiple currencies so need to handle that

assertions.text: Classes use PascalCase naming (Invoice, VendorInfo, LineItem)
assertions.description: All class names should follow PascalCase convention

assertions.text: Fields use snake_case naming (vendor_name, line_total, tax_rate)
assertions.description: All field names should follow snake_case convention
Every field should have a clear @description explaining its purpose

assertions.text: Multi-currency support implemented (currency fields, CurrencyAmount class, or per-item currency)
assertions.description: Schema should handle invoices with items in different currencies

assertions.text: Includes line items with quantities, prices, and totals
assertions.description: LineItem class should have quantity, unit_price, and line_total fields
Schema should capture vendor name, address, contact info, tax ID

assertions.text: Includes tax handling (tax amounts, rates, or tax breakdown)
assertions.description: Schema should handle sales tax, VAT, or other tax types

assertions.text: Includes at least 3 diverse test cases
assertions.description: Should have tests for simple invoices, multi-currency, and edge cases
All function prompts should include the output format template variable

assertions.text: Test names are descriptive (not test1, test2)
assertions.description: Tests should have meaningful names like extract_multicurrency_invoice
